title: Start Before You're Ready
hook_text: The best time was a year ago
body_text: The second best time is right now
voiceover_text: The best time to start was a year ago. The second best time is right now. Picture where you'd be if you'd started this twelve months back. A content library that's been compounding all year. A skill you'd actually be good at by now. An income stream that already runs while you sleep. That version of you exists in a timeline where you simply began. The thing is, a year from now you'll feel exactly the same about today. This moment is the year-ago moment for your future self. The tools have never been cheaper. The barrier has never been lower. The only thing standing between you and that compounding curve is the decision to take the first imperfect step. Don't let next year be another year of almost. Follow for more, and start today.
caption: The best time to start was a year ago. The second best time is right now. Picture the content library, the skill, the income stream you'd have if you'd begun twelve months back. A year from now you'll feel the same about today. The tools have never been cheaper and the barrier has never been lower. Take the first imperfect step. #aitools #passiveincome #financialfreedom #theleveragestack #wealthbuilding #sidehustle #aiautomation #buildingwealth
